[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white anime-style close-up shows a hand covering part of a person’s mouth and face, with bold repeating text across the top and bottom.

The main focus is a drawn figure in grayscale with a hand raised near the mouth area; the hand covers part of the face while the figure’s cheek and lower face are visible in profile.

The setting appears to be an illustrated, graphic background rather than a real location, with no clear outdoor or indoor environment; lighting looks like high-contrast grayscale shading consistent with comic/anime art.

The image uses strong black, white, and gray tones, with smooth linework and shaded contours. The raised hand occupies the right side of the frame, with fingers curved and partially overlapping the mouth area. The figure’s hair or head shape is visible on the left side, with thick, dark outlines and light gray shading. The composition is tightly cropped, focusing on the face and hand. Bold white text is repeated at the top and bottom edges, partially cut off by the frame.

Visible Text:
KSHWHWHWQ RQLSKWUKQL
KINGQLSKWUWK

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up anime-style drawing of a face partially covered by a hand. Bold repeating text appears at the top and bottom, partially cut off by the image edges.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

KSHWWHWHWWHWWHQUL  
KINGQLSKWUWK

# Notes

- The text appears to be stylized/concatenated with no clear spacing; some characters may be visually unclear. If you provide a higher-resolution screenshot, I can attempt a more precise character-by-character transcription.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
